headline: Transcript: Biden’s departing gift to Ukraine
summary: Sonja Hutson talks to Felicia Schwartz and Brooke Masters
body_text:
This is an audio transcript of the FT News Briefing podcast episode: ‘Biden’s departing gift to Ukraine’

Sonja HutsonGood morning from the Financial Times. Today is Tuesday, December 31st. And this is your FT News Briefing. Investors in US equities are cashing in on another blockbuster year. And the Biden administration is scrambling to send aid to Ukraine before Trump takes office. Plus, European asset managers are getting shown up by their American rivals.

Brooke Masters So as global investors looked around and said, I wanna get away from slow growth in Europe, they wanna buy American assets.

Sonja Hutson I’m Sonja Hutson, and here’s the news you need to start your day.

[MUSIC PLAYING]

US stocks dropped for the second trading day in a row yesterday. The S&P 500 fell 1 per cent and the Nasdaq Composite dropped 1.2 per cent. Equities had such a good year that investors are now selling shares so they can cash in on all that growth. Monday’s sell-off was really broad. About 95 per c
